movie.actors: Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, James Franco, Thomas Haden Church
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Film Award. Another 3 wins & 32 nominations.
movie.plot: A strange black entity from another world bonds with Peter Parker and causes inner turmoil as he contends with new villains, temptations, and revenge.
movie.title: Spider-Man 3
movie.writer: Sam Raimi (screenplay), Ivan Raimi (screenplay), Alvin Sargent (screenplay), Sam Raimi (screen story), Ivan Raimi (screen story), Stan Lee (Marvel comic book), Steve Ditko (Marvel comic book)
